tests.purpose: IWAD/PWAD header, little-endian directory, bounds, names, offsets, sizes and occurrence indices
duplicate-name last-occurrence lookup while preserving both provenance rows
E1M1 marker confinement; never consume same-name lumps beyond E1M2
signed coordinates and independent easy/medium/hard, ambush and not-single-player file bits; no gameplay-mode inference
LINEDEFS, SIDEDEFS, VERTEXES, SEGS, SSECTORS and SECTORS values and signed fields
node partition, bboxes and unsigned 0x8000 subsector child flags
BLOCKMAP signed origin, dimensions, shared offset lists, zero header and terminators
REJECT row-major bit order and required byte count from sector count
all PLAYPAL palettes and all COLORMAP bands with spot entries
PNAMES plus TEXTURE1/TEXTURE2, odd widths, negative origins and overlapping placements
patch header, post framing, transparent gaps and palette index zero as opaque data
tall-patch relative top-delta continuation after prior absolute top 250
sprite frame/rotation naming and sparse patch texels
flat namespace, 64x64 size and texel order
Doom sound header/sample payload and MUS header inputs
15 malformed fixtures return exact stable codes on two executions
out-of-range vertex, sector, linedef, seg, node-child and patch references are rejected
two clean-process parses produce byte-identical compact JSON and no volatile fields
ten independent parser semantic mutations are killed by their named visible tests
